programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Jimbo and Ned's efforts to drive up the ratings for their new hunting show on the cable access channel threatens to edge out an old favourite, 'Jesus and Pals.'

programme.title: BoJack Horseman: Stop the Presses
programme.desc: Todd builds a giant papier-mache Todd head. A customer service rep gives BoJack some sound advice when he tries to cancel his newspaper subscription.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Stars
programme.desc: After thinking she's finally got a shot at a record deal, the holiday season derails a young woman's dream.

programme.title: Movie: On Strike for Christmas
programme.desc: A mother goes on strike when all of her efforts for a perfect family Christmas get taken for granted. Chaos ensues when she convinces all the other neighbourhood mothers to join in, and the strike takes on a life of its own when the local news finds out.

programme.title: Movie: Dear Secret Santa
programme.desc: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a woman moves back into the house she grew up in, brining back memories of the boy next door who recently passed away. One day she receives a Christmas card from a secret admirer she believes to be the same boy.

programme.title: Movie: Homemade Christmas
programme.desc: Every year, an ambitious young woman uses the weeks leading up to Christmas to become the ultimate holiday freelance assistant for hire, helping with any Christmas related tasks for extra income.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Reagan Assassination Attempt
programme.desc: In 1981, a gunman fires six shots at Ronald Reagan. What follows is a chaotic rush to save Reagan's life, confusion at the White House, and an urgent investigation to find out if this is a wider plot, or the work of a lone assassin.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Two construction workers are brutally attacked in San Antonio, but one survives and is able to identify his assailant.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: A small-town electrician sits on Texas death row for the murder of a 19-year-old college student, but forensic science could exonerate him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tales from the Still: Uncovering the King
programme.desc: The Moonshiners talk about some of their favourite stills, including 'Elvis,' Popcorn Sutton's most prolific still that Mark and Digger uncovered in Georgia.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tales from the Still: Scaled Up, Chilled Out
programme.desc: The Moonshiners describe their favourite stills, weigh on their favourite shine and share some of their most memorable misadventures, including Tickle, Henry and Kenny's scaled-up CBD-infused moonshine operation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tales from the Still: An Outlaw's Life Sentence
programme.desc: The shiners relive their most memorable moments including Tickle's life sentence, Mark and Digger's sweet justice, Josh's obstacle smashing and Mike tasting his own medicine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tales from the Still: Mrs. Tickle to the Rescue
programme.desc: The Tickles relive one of their favourite moments that required the former bondswoman to come to the rescue after a risky bootleg attempt.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mr. and Mrs. Tickle's Big Bootleg
programme.desc: Tickle comes to the rescue after apprentice moonshiners Howard and Moe 'lose' a quarter of their run. But when the old friends embark on a risky bootleg operation, only newlywed and former bondswoman, Mrs. Tickle, can save them all from the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: A subculture of distillers across America carries on the backwoods tradition of moonshining. Now, judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, America's top legal and outlaw shiners go head to head to see who has what it takes to be called Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mr. and Mrs. Tickle's Big Bootleg
programme.desc: Tickle comes to the rescue after apprentice moonshiners Howard and Moe 'lose' a quarter of their run. But when the old friends embark on a risky bootleg operation, only newlywed and former bondswoman, Mrs. Tickle, can save them all from the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: American Whiskey
programme.desc: Heritage grains meet charred oak as three amateur distillers compete to make the best American Whiskey. Judged by Mark, Digger and Tim, they'll go head to head in a series of challenges to determine who has what it takes to be Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Gold Rush: It's Alive
programme.desc: Rick bets nearly all his gold on a new machine that could transform his operation. Tony resurrects an abandoned secret weapon. Parker hires new crew members to make up for lost time.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Dirt: A New Attitude
programme.desc: Parker lays out his new mine boss philosophy and Mitch and Brennan weigh in. The Ness crew explains how less laughs might equal more gold. Kruse starts a side career as a talk show host. Fred Hurt at 77 explains why he has no intention of slowing down.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Expedition X: Round-Up at Death Ranch
programme.desc: Bizarre cattle mutations in the Pacific Northwest lead Josh Gates to send his team to investigate. The baffling deaths make Jessica and Phil question if the cattle were victims of newly arrived apex predators or the target of something more sinister.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Celebrity Spirit
programme.desc: 'The Big Bang Theory's' Jim Parsons and his sister get a reading. Then, Susan Lucci welcomes Theresa into her home. Later, Theresa channels spirit for 'Sopranos' star Jamie Lynn Sigler, and 'Scandal's' Katie Lowes travels to Long Island for a reading.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Panic Attack
programme.desc: Theresa's gets the surprising results from her brain scan with Dr. Amen. At a group reading, Theresa validates the presence of a loved one by telling his family what underwear he wore at his funeral.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: I Now Pronounce You...
programme.desc: Theresa is asked to officiate a wedding for two people who met at one of her group readings, and Larry is asked to be their best man. Before heading to Los Angeles for the ceremony, Theresa surprises a woman on Wall Street with a reading.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: My Mystery Man
programme.desc: Micah reunites with model-friend Helena for a very hot and steamy modeling session. Barry and Isaac try to talk about the birds and the bees. Lydia reveals she has a secret crush, and Moriah goes on her first date ever.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney's Long-Distance Relationship
programme.desc: Agonizing over his blow up with Whitney, Buddy seeks her out to apologize but scares her with the intensity of his reaction. When Whitney visits Chase in Wilmington, North Carolina, for the weekend, he gives her an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Slipping Through My Fingers
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to Wilmington, Chase shocks Whitney by asking her to move in with him. When Covid-19 hits too close to home after some scary news from Buddy, Whitney fears for the safety of her parents.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: You Can't Stop the Girl
programme.desc: Ethan is left speechless after Olivia gets a body piercing. Ethan and Olivia host Micah and Moriah for their first ever Independence Day. Kim, Barry and the kids head back to the farm to welcome visitors from down under.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Very Busby Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Busbys plan a very special Thanksgiving, but bad news for Mimi may throw the holiday into turmoil. When Adam and Danielle find out that Riley and Parker are moving up to a different classroom, Adam struggles with the idea of separating the quints.

programme.desc: Agonizing over his blow up with Whitney, Buddy seeks her out to apologize but scares her with the intensity of his reaction. When Whitney visits Chase in Wilmington, North Carolina, for the weekend, he gives her an unexpected surprise.

programme.desc: During a weekend trip to Wilmington, Chase shocks Whitney by asking her to move in with him. When Covid-19 hits too close to home after some scary news from Buddy, Whitney fears for the safety of her parents.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Very Busby Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Busbys plan a very special Thanksgiving, but bad news for Mimi may throw the holiday into turmoil. When Adam and Danielle find out that Riley and Parker are moving up to a different classroom, Adam struggles with the idea of separating the quints.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: I Did Not See This Coming
programme.desc: A group of women are visited by the best friend they lost, plus, Theresa's parents act as accomplices to bring peace to some friends.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Stars and Spirits
programme.desc: Theresa's in Hollywood to read stars of the past and present. 80's superstar Taylor Dayne, Say Yes To The Dress Atlanta's Monte Durham, The Office's Kate Flannery, Roseanne's Michael Fishman, and Family Matters' dad Reginald VelJohnson.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Fashionably Late
programme.desc: While Randy's in Barcelona showing his second collection, Chelsea's princess dream dress goes missing from the store and crazy rich Asian bride Cheryl finds fault with every gown she sees.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Whose Side Are You On?
programme.desc: Michaella is getting married in an Irish castle, and she wants a princess dress for less than a king's ransom. Also, fashionista Shavonne has a high-style reputation to maintain.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Twelve Years in the Making
programme.desc: When bride Chontelle's dream dress is no longer available, she'll need to come up with a brand new vision, or go home devastated. Bride Maddie is giving her bridesmaids the freedom to pick a dress they love, but prankster Tae has ideas of her own.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Perfect Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Bride Toya is upstaged by her opinionated bridesmaids who head downstairs to shop for themselves instead of helping her. Bride Kayla is also downstairs looking for the perfect shade of blue, that may not even exist outside her wedding vision.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Amber and Tammilee
programme.desc: Tammilee from Spokane saves enough money to go on multiple vacations with her husband every year.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Desirae and Stephanie
programme.desc: Desirae is so thrifty, she doesn't pay for newspapers and gets her coupons from public recycling bins. Stephanie teaches her son to coupon before sending him off to college.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Rebecca and Jessica
programme.desc: Rebecca will fit all of her food needs for her huge party into her $50 monthly food budget. Jessica will pull off 18 transactions to get over $600 worth of groceries.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Tai and Tarin and Nathan
programme.desc: Twins Tai and Tarin get birthday freebies; Nathan prepares 1,000 military care packages.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Nukkie and Pookie (Finally) Say I Do
programme.desc: Two gypsy sweethearts finally plan their long awaited wedding despite their mothers' disapproval. However, the grudge has spread to other family members, and the couple wonders if it will ever be put to rest. Plus, an ex-con gypsy tries to move forward.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: The Greek Goddess and the Giant Gown
programme.desc: A Greek Gypsy bride-to-be sets out to make history in the biggest, blinged-out wedding dress ever made. Later, it's a clash amongst the generations when a gypsy teen's sweet 16 party is derailed by her over-bearing traditional grandmother.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Welcome to Hillbilly Hell
programme.desc: Gypsy Hunter and her Cherokee boyfriend are madly in love, but her gun-toting mom won't accept him unless he passes gruelling trials. Gypsy Cherub was in a bad car accident, but her 21st birthday may be a chance to regain her confidence and find love.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: The Ultimate Gypsy-Gorger-Gypsy Love Triangle
programme.desc: Cearia plans to wed gorger fiancé Sam, but is soon in a love triangle when her cousin Kyle proclaims that they should be together. Mom Angie plans a party for her daughter Jewel, hoping to find her a Gypsy husband, but Jewel is secretly seeing a gorger.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a pushy businesswoman learns that her VISA has run out and she'll be deported back to Canada, she forces her assistant to marry her. Her assistant agrees to the plan, but only if she promises to give him a promotion.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Remote Control
programme.desc: When coronavirus makes it unsafe for crews to film, the moms pick up the cameras to self-shoot. Despite quarantine, Leah's book release pushes her and Jeremy to confront their past.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not So Normal Times
programme.desc: As the country emerges from quarantine, Briana struggles with the decision to send Nova back to school, Jade is excited to get back to work and wants Sean to do the same.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Like No Other
programme.desc: One thousand women descend upon Texas Stadium for Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders open auditions.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bubba Wallace
programme.desc: NASCAR's Bubba Wallace sits with Rob, Stee-lo and Chanel to drive fast and hard in 'trading paint,' play some 'next level games' and get into some road rage throw downs in street heat.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXXIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo get stuck in the suck cycle, redefine the term red-lining, and meet some saucy Aussies.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyga II
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome rap superstar Tyga as they watch some people 'get a taste', witness what could go wrong when you 'make it haute' and find out what kind of talents can make you legendary'.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Let's Give 'Em Something to Tonka About
programme.desc: Dave travels to Murietta and is hoping his competition won't want to purchase a large locker they have to move. Justin snags a decent locker. Ivy and Ivy Jr. have a therapeutic day. Mary locates a little treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fowl Play
programme.desc: The buyers travel to Torrance and Dave sees an increase in his profits. It's positive news when Mary discovers some clothes that don't fit. Kenny tries a be an early bird, but winds up becoming the dodo.

programme.title: Storage Wars: It's Bring Your Kids to Work Day
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi bring their kids to the auction during spring break. Meanwhile, Ivy hopes to stock up for his upcoming store auction and Darrel puts his 'Gambler' nickname to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Storage Wars: I Learned It From Watching You!
programme.desc: After hours in Huntington Beach brings out the family; Rene's daughter has a great eye; The Schulz/ Passantes add to their outdoor options; and the Gambler meets the predators.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Quality Bro Chime
programme.desc: It's 'Bring your Brother to Work Day' in Thousand Oaks. Justin sinks his money into a unit with an interesting pair. Dave pushes Mary to the breaking point. Kenny finds the time to make a nice profit, piece by piece.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Donut Effect
programme.desc: Darrell comes armed with donuts in an attempt to distract the competition with a sugar rush, while Jarrod and Brandi plan a four-year anniversary party for their Orange Store.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Oysters on the Half Plate
programme.desc: The buyers dock in Long Beach, California, where Barry shells out for a unit that leads him to the high seas and Darrell and Brandon find an interesting kit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Thrill of a Kitty and the Agony of Smoked Meat
programme.desc: Darrell tries to smoke the competition and proves that sometimes treasure can look like trash. Mary struggles to wrangle information from the more experienced buyers, but Rene is not looking to share first place in the hunt for the best locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Mom Factor
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi are all about having fun as they try to dunk the competition. Darrell and Brandon hope to be on par with a victory, while Casey tries her hand at bidding. Ivy transforms his store into an auction house.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Father Bids Best
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon look to instigate the other buyers and sneak through the melee. Rene brings his father, Gunter, to the auction, resulting in laughs and profits. Dave has his sights set on a big score. Ivy hits the auctions hard despite an injury.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Not all that Glitters is Gourd
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies arrive in vintage style, though not everyone agrees. Darrell tries to peddle his wares to Emily.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Out of the Frying Pan Am
programme.desc: The buyers hit Dan's home town, and the Vegas Ladies' locker really takes off.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Granny Get Your Gun
programme.desc: Ivy can't get enough from Montebello. Dave gets a taste of carnival fun. Jarrod and Brandi shred vintage style.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Total Wine Domination

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: The Wolfpack must build a fence to halt intruding hunters onto their ranch, while Gabe and Rose prepare to welcome the arrival of their baby girl. A looming cold front forces the Browns on a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A historic lack of snowfall prevents Stan Zuray from reaching his trapline. Charlie Wright joins forces with Stan to defend an ancestral trapline from an unknown invader. Courtney Agnes passes on dying native traditions to her daughter Cuppie.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Less Than Zero
programme.desc: Villagers race to prepare for an early cold snap. Stan uses Yukon engineering to make a risky repair to his truck. Chris and Jessi enlist their dog Tozi to help them haul firewood. And Charlie tries to stop a deadly fire.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: The Wolfpack must build a fence to halt intruding hunters onto their ranch, while Gabe and Rose prepare to welcome the arrival of their baby girl. A looming cold front forces the Browns on a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.desc: A historic lack of snowfall prevents Stan Zuray from reaching his trapline. Charlie Wright joins forces with Stan to defend an ancestral trapline from an unknown invader. Courtney Agnes passes on dying native traditions to her daughter Cuppie.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Less Than Zero
programme.desc: Villagers race to prepare for an early cold snap. Stan uses Yukon engineering to make a risky repair to his truck. Chris and Jessi enlist their dog Tozi to help them haul firewood. And Charlie tries to stop a deadly fire.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Midnight Run
programme.desc: The miners begin to journey into the unexplored and unforgiving wilderness of Greenland. While searching for the ultimate treasure, half the team ends up stranded five miles from camp while the rest discover what could be a massive gold deposit.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Death From Above
programme.desc: The miners split into two groups and head out on a recon mission going on almost no sleep. One group hits a deadly valley that has massive boulders coming down.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Night and Day
programme.desc: The wardens work around the clock to handle turkey hunting season and smelt runs. A search warrant is needed upon the discovery of poached turkeys. The wardens come across many animals including orphaned baby foxes, nuisance beavers and a python.

programme.title: North Woods Law: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The entire warden service pulls together for a massive search effort for a missing boy. A second search for a lost hiker stretches the wardens to their limit. A pair of salmon poachers are caught in the act and a new K-9 is trained.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cheaters
programme.desc: A notorious gang of poachers are up to their old tricks. Also, the wardens stop some suspects from fleeing the state and the forensic team investigates who shot at a woman in her backyard.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Game Warden Albert Flores enforces fishing laws. Game Warden Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers. Game Warden Jayme Deschaaf makes sure dove hunters follow the laws.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Conduct
programme.desc: Inman and Eddins assist on a manhunt when a suspect runs a constable off the road. An ordinary fishing check in Navarro County leads Amundson to illegal activity. In Jasper County, game wardens patrol an area after receiving trespassing complaints.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs
programme.desc: The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake and land, as summer is in full swing. Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun. An under-age drinker tells too many lies. Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Client
programme.desc: Beverly Carter, a beloved mother, wife and a successful real estate broker had a long list of clients. Then she vanished. Like all-too-many missing persons cases, police knew it was a race against time to find her, before it was too late.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Quiet One
programme.desc: A beautiful woman thought she'd found her prince charming but their story turned out to be anything but a fairy tale. He was downstairs with the kids while she was upstairs in the bath. Then it happened; was it an accident or murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters

programme.title: Cold Justice: Devoted (Fort Walton Beach, FL)

programme.title: Cold Justice: Room #10

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome: City of Blood and Glory
programme.desc: The timeless icons of ancient Rome serve as monuments to prodigious power, cruel madness and the epic legends from the world's most-powerful empire. Archeologists use cutting-edge tech to reveal the hidden secrets of Rome's classic wonders.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome: City of Blood and Glory

programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Homicide City: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: When a hard-working, pregnant mother vanishes, detectives stumble on a love-triangle that may explain the secrets behind her death.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Torture Chamber
programme.desc: When Lisa Holden gets married and moves to an isolated home in rural Texas, it triggers a long, inexplicable estrangement from her family. But at the root of this painful divide lies something far more evil than her family could ever imagine.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Right Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When a young woman is found sexually assaulted and bleeding from a single bullet wound at work, it first appears to be a robbery gone horribly wrong. But over the years the investigation snares multiple suspects, before taking a sharp turn 10 years later.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: A 15 year old goes missing after heading out into the park to take pictures. Two days later, police find her badly beaten body and a clue that leads back to her high school.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Red Jacket
programme.desc: On Valentine's night, 2015, 27-year-old James Enright is stabbed to death outside a busy train station in Burnaby, Canada. Despite cell phone footage of the attack, police struggle to identify his killer, until CCTV leads them to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Maurice's Last Visitor
programme.desc: On December 10th, 2011, Maurice Byrd is found dead in his home with multiple gunshot wounds. Security footage from a neighboring church reveals that prior to his body being discovered, Maurice had many visitors.

programme.title: See No Evil: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Larry Weaver spends the night in Sikeston, Missouri. The next day he vanishes without a trace. Police launch a statewide search and rescue mission, but only when they turn to surveillance cameras, do they find out the terrifying truth of what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: All That It Seems
programme.desc: A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, produces one casualty.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: We Never Fight
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 23-year-old Christina Morris goes missing while out with friends in Plano, Texas. Police franticly search to find her alive, but it's the discovery of surveillance camera footage that reveals the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Looks Like You
programme.desc: A quiet town is shaken to its core when an innocent woman is gunned down in broad daylight. Detectives desperately act to find her killer and restore the peace. With a murderer on the loose, can video surveillance uncover what lies beneath?

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan
programme.desc: When a teenager goes missing from her local Walmart, detectives struggle for leads. But then surveillance cameras reveal terrifying footage of a prowler kidnapping her, transforming this investigation into a desperate race to bring her home alive.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Hearst vs. Pulitzer
programme.desc: In the late 1890s when William Randolph Hearst challenges the king of newspaper publishing Joseph Pulitzer in a high stakes circulation war, they change publishing forever by stopping at nothing to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Hearthstone and Butcher Block Island
programme.desc: A stone specialist uses Italian sandstone upside down for a rustic finish. Norm and Paul Grothouse have a meeting of woodworking minds. The butcher block top for the kitchen island has a waterfall edge with eye-catching joinery called a dovetail key.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Secondary Spaces
programme.desc: Roger finishes the driveway and planting. Norm tours the nearly complete and very white first floor. Bold, hand-drawn wave-pattered wallpaper is installed in the powder room. Tom and the homeowner make a DIY workshop with materials from the home centre.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: The Big Finish
programme.desc: Tom installs an old-school doorbell that the homeowners wanted to keep. Sally and kitchen designer Kathy Marshall show off the kitchen's functionality. A space for the kids is downstairs as well as a workshop for John. The energy auditor tests the home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Houston

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Philadelphia

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Austin

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Manhattan

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.desc: A little boy finds it hard to keep believing in Santa Claus, so he stays up late on Christmas Eve to listen for any sign of him. His efforts are rewarded by the sound of a train that whisks him and other children away to the North Pole.

programme.title: Movie: Free Birds
programme.desc: Two turkeys go back in time to change the course of history and take turkey off the holiday menu for good.

programme.title: Movie: Planes, Trains and Automobiles

programme.title: Movie: Clueless

programme.title: Movie: She's All That

programme.title: Movie: Grease
programme.desc: A leather-jacketed boy and a goody-two-shoes girl fall in and out of love in the 1950s.

programme.title: Movie: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When five very different students report to a Saturday morning detention, they come to find that they actually have more in common than they had originally thought.

programme.title: Movie: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: A teenager's suffers every embarrassing moment possible on her 'Sweet 16.'

programme.title: Movie: Overboard
programme.desc: A snobby heiress suffers from amnesia after falling off her yacht and hitting her head. A carpenter takes advantage of the situation by convincing her that she is his wife and the mother of his unruly brood of children.

programme.title: Movie: Grease
programme.desc: A leather-jacketed boy and a goody-two-shoes girl fall in and out of love in the 1950s.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act
programme.desc: A lounge singer witnesses a murder by her mobster boyfriend and hides out in a convent.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Vienna
programme.desc: Jess, a concert violinist who has lost her passion, visits Vienna for Christmas. There she finds the inspiration she has been missing with an American diplomat and his children.

programme.title: Movie: Heart of the Holidays
programme.desc: A career-driven woman returns to her hometown for the holidays and faces her high-school boyfriend. Together, they rediscover what matters most in life.

programme.title: Movie: Good Morning Christmas!
programme.desc: Two squabbling TV hosts are sent to a festive small town over Christmas. While pretending to get along for the sake of appearance, they discover that there's more to each other than they thought.

programme.title: Movie: A Nashville Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A television producer is forced to work with the man who broke her heart on a country music Christmas special while being interrupted by Christmas spirits determined for her to revisit her past.

programme.title: Movie: Reunited at Christmas
programme.desc: A novelist and her boyfriend head to her late grandmother's house for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood
programme.desc: When a NYC event planner returns to Tennessee to plan the Christmas celebration at Dollywood, she's paired with the head of operations who thinks he can handle the party just fine on his own.

programme.title: Movie: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent is forced to make cutbacks during the holiday season. A chance encounter leads her to meet a man and his young daughter, which leads to an unexpected romance, and a new song for her repertoire.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: A small-town factory, Aunt Sally's Christmas Cookie Company, is sold to large conglomerate. Their executive must seal the deal and shut down the factory, the town's lifeblood, but things become complicated when she meets the new owner.

programme.title: Movie: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: A woman offers stranded family a place to stay during a blizzard. Unbeknownst to her, they are members of a royal family. Despite their different backgrounds, the woman shows her guests what a small-town Christmas is all about.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under the Stars
programme.desc: A man loses his job right before Christmas, so he takes a temporary job selling trees. While at work, he meets a woman and her son, who are dealing with the sudden loss of her father. The two get to talking, and out of their loss, love grows.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: Movie: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa grants a wish for a woman and she gets a chance to prove herself to her boss. Santa's wish only gives her 48 hours and as the clock ticks down, she channels the Christmas magic and speaks her mind all on her own.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche
programme.desc: Stan's life is a shambles both at home and in school. Randy's obsession with the Food Network Is changing everything. It even forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park: Holiday Special
programme.desc: An undeniable bond is formed between a white man and a Native American man.

programme.title: South Park: Let Them Eat Goo
programme.desc: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping
programme.desc: Cartman considers himself the top online restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Cartman's favourite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: The boys sign up to sponsor an Ethiopian child to get a fancy new sport watch, but the organization accidentally sends the child instead. When government authorities show up, they mistake Cartman for a starving African child and ship him to Ethiopia.

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
programme.desc: Kyle is on his deathbed with a rare kidney disease. Cartman is found to be the perfect donor, but withholds his kidney until Kyle can pay him 10 million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Red Man's Greed
programme.desc: The citizens of South Park are being forced off their land to make way for a new super highway after owners of the Three Feathers Indian Casino acquire the town.

programme.title: South Park: A History Channel Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The boys are getting close to discovering the truth about the first Thanksgiving.

programme.title: South Park: Helen Keller! The Musical
programme.desc: When Butters informs the fourth graders that the kindergarteners school play is a magnificent sight to behold, they go through a lot of pain to make sure they beat the tiny tots' show. Timmy also finds a new best friend named Gobbles.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Nov 19, 2020
programme.desc: Rudy Giuliani has a hair dye malfunction, Trevor examines the pandemic's effects on Thanksgiving, and Bill Gates discusses COVID-19, climate change and his new podcast with Rashida Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: The South Park Elementary School Talent Show is coming up and Jimmy can't wait to perform his comedy routine. But first he must find a way to gain control of his raging hormones.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Finds Love
programme.desc: Cartman finally lets a special someone knows exactly how he feels about them.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: A record company steals Chef's song 'Stinky Britches' and he sues them for the rights. When Johnny Cochrane defends the record company, Chef is left penniless. But he has some very famous and talented friends who want to help their old mentor.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: BoJack Horseman: Old Acquaintance
programme.desc: BoJack is up for a part in David Pincher’s latest film. Diane meets Mr. Peanutbutter's brother, and Todd takes the business in a new direction.

programme.desc: A girl searching for a new tradition to lift her holiday spirits realizes that it’s not the traditions we cherish, but the people we spend them with. And, while preparing for her new tradition, she stumbles upon the final thing her Christmas was missing.

programme.title: Movie: Grounded for Christmas
