programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Tabora Family
programme.desc: Meet the Tabora Family, the newest Military Makeover recipients of Converse, Texas. Don't miss as our design and construction team tee up their to-do lists to give this family the makeover they deserve.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Great Women of Egypt
programme.desc: Josh journeys through the land of the Nile to uncover the secrets of three of the most powerful, and most elusive, women in ancient Egypt: Hatshepsut, Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates is on a nation-wide treasure hunt to solve a mystery no one has cracked for forty years: The Secret. Josh travels coast-to-coast and back in time using cutting edge augmented reality and tapping into a network of obsessed Secret detectives.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Snake Kings
programme.desc: Josh Gates returns to Guatemala with a potential breakthrough in the search for a Snake King tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: D.B. Cooper Hijacking Mystery
programme.desc: There is only one unsolved plane hijacking in US history, and Josh Gates has determined to crack the case. Picking up where the FBI left off, he discovers new clues and theories in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Happy Joshgiving
programme.desc: Josh gives thanks with Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives star Guy Fieri, Cheryl Hines of Curb Your Enthusiasm and Alfonso Ribeiro of The Fresh Prince. World Champion Turkey Carver Paul Kelly shows Josh how to slice up his bird.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into one of America's oldest witch stories. In the Tennessee backwoods, locals report being attacked in a vast cave system. Jess and Phil go underground and uncover frightening piles of bones as well as potential human remains.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters travel to the Holy Land to investigate if their prized sword once belonged to the Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Cutting-edge archaeology reveals a network of hidden tunnels in Jerusalem with ties to the Bible's greatest relics.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Happy Joshgiving
programme.desc: Josh gives thanks with Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives star Guy Fieri, Cheryl Hines of Curb Your Enthusiasm and Alfonso Ribeiro of The Fresh Prince. World Champion Turkey Carver Paul Kelly shows Josh how to slice up his bird.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into one of America's oldest witch stories. In the Tennessee backwoods, locals report being attacked in a vast cave system. Jess and Phil go underground and uncover frightening piles of bones as well as potential human remains.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters travel to the Holy Land to investigate if their prized sword once belonged to the Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Cutting-edge archaeology reveals a network of hidden tunnels in Jerusalem with ties to the Bible's greatest relics.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Top Dog, Lone Wolf?

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Downhill Slide

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Nature's Fury

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant becomes a one-man army when he takes on a team of court officers; the brother of a murder victim tries to get revenge in court; a defendant takes aim at a judge with a most unusual potential weapon; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his five young children faces their mother in court; a prolific armed robber unleashes a nasty surprise when he is sentenced; a defendant meets his infant son for the very first time in court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A frustrated robbery suspect doesn't like his attorney, and shows it with his fist; a judge and defendant have an unlikely tearful reunion; a look at one of the country's most dangerous courthouses; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Fists fly when a quiet Michigan courtroom erupts into an all-out melee; a pro-pot defendant lights up right in front of a judge; a tension-filled husband and wife murder trial ends with a shocking verdict; and more.

programme.desc: A judge convicted of a felony is dragged from the courtroom; a man makes a desperate attempt to escape a courthouse after being told he's headed to prison; a defendant pays a heavy price for a profanity laced tirade aimed at a judge; and more.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Encounter/ Car Trouble
programme.desc: In Miami, detectives work the murder of a hard working janitor, brutally stabbed to death in his own apartment. In Birmingham, detectives investigate the murder of a man walking home after fixing a friend's car.

programme.title: The First 48: Innocent Bystander/ Partners in Crime
programme.desc: A man is stabbed at a strip mall in the middle of the night and surveillance video captures the murder, but it leaves more questions than answers.

programme.title: The First 48: A Date With Death/ Paid in Blood
programme.desc: In Cleveland, for Detectives Kathleen Carlin and Tim Entenok, friends are the key to solving the murder of a father shot in the back.

programme.title: The First 48: Room for the Night/ Down and Out
programme.desc: Detective Barrere investigates when three men meet in a motel room in New Orleans east, and one of them ends up dead. Meanwhile in Tulsa, a man is stabbed 21 times when a night of drinking ignites a murderous rage.

programme.title: The First 48: Endless Love and Out of Time
programme.desc: In Tulsa, an act of vengeance leaves an elderly woman beaten and stabbed to death in her home. In Kansas City, a young man with a promising future runs out of time to get out of a dangerous business.

programme.title: The First 48: Lying in Wait/ With This Ring
programme.desc: In Atlanta two men are ambushed at gunpoint and only one survives to tell the tale. Also, A mother is found stabbed to death on the side of the road, but a wedding ring dropped at the scene could break the case.

programme.title: The First 48: After Hours and the Cutting Edge
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a stranger guns down a new father in a parking lot. In Gwinnett County, a man is stabbed more than 20 times when someone he trusts turns against him.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: The Case That Haunts Me I
programme.desc: In Memphis, the murder of six people in a house on Lester Street tears a family apart. In Atlanta, the shooting of a young engaged couple haunts investigators.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Shocking Confessions
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a key witness denies any knowledge of a brutal homicide until confronted with evidence; in Dallas, a suspect shocks detectives with an unexpected confession.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Footloose
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal call out bizarre names while working the front desk of an office, and tonight's loser gets up close and personal with some strange feet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Backyard Cookout Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a late-summer cookout featuring the real star of the Impractical Jokers Movie: Paula Abdul.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode
programme.desc: The guys hit the virtual nightclub with DJ Marshmello and Edie Falco. Joe sends the guys some bottle service.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Ike and Mike
programme.desc: Ike's twin brother pays a visit to ask a favor. Meanwhile, the crew takes DNA tests and get some shocking results.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: When Fire Commissioner Eddie Penisi, Sr. shows up at the station, Eddie and Terry vie for his approval. Meanwhile, the rest of the team plays Dungeons & Dragons to win the acceptance of their dungeon master.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Stop, Drop and Roll With It
programme.desc: Firefighters and Drag Queens enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst Day of My Life
programme.desc: Party animals get utterly wasted by Chef Willie's chicken wings, while model BFFs struggle to keep their composure and answer any questions.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Steve Austin
programme.desc: Stone Cold Steve Austin may be a six-time WWF World Heavyweight Champion and WWE Hall of Famer, but spicy food might make him meet his match.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Nick Offerman
programme.desc: Nick Offerman discusses his love affair with white oak, explores modern masculinity and responds to the internet's favorite Ron Swanson-isms.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q take to the ice for a very slippery game. Then they head to the park to get support for some ridiculous causes, and tonight's loser is forced to relive the sins of his past before a captive, critical audience.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: The guys play a game of 'put-pocket' at a grocery store, then get jumpy at the park after taking each other's cell phones. Plus, tonight's biggest loser learns that when you gotta go, you gotta go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Big Uneasy
programme.desc: The guys take over New Orleans, as they steal sips from strangers' drinks at a famous bar, spin the Wheel of Voo-Doom on Bourbon Street, and crash some horse and buggy rides. Then, tonight's loser turns into a legendary swamp monster.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Chase is dating several different girls on Valentine's Day, he recruits Savannah to help teach his son a lesson about respecting women.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Savannah has a rose coloured view of what her spending habits will look like when she goes off to college.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd
programme.desc: Todd is hurt when he offers help to all his kids but no one needs it, until Savannah is hit with appendicitis.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: College Bootcamp
programme.desc: When Chase pays a stranger to change his flat tire, Todd and Julie realize that they have sheltered their kids, and only have a few months left to teach them the basics of life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Julie is excited to start her new food blog but when no one 'likes' her page, she and Todd go on a food journey, which takes them from fine French cuisine to foraging for their own food.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: California Dreamin’
programme.desc: Laidback surfer boy California takes Lisa to a ghost town for an old Western photoshoot, but it's not all smiles after he reveals his cheesy flirtation. Fitness model Clavacia meets bubbly Charmee for dinner and a drink or ten.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Walk the Line
programme.desc: Pole dance instructor Priscilla reaches new heights with Spanish surfer David at a rock-climbing lesson. Sh'kineh and Chanel share their mutual love of the circus on a high-wire tightrope walking class.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Drag Queens and D-Bags
programme.desc: Professional Drag Queen Jason hopes to make sparks fly with fitness buff Cory in a metal work shop, but waits to drop the real bomb when he shows up at dinner in full Drag to see if Cory can handle it.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Baby, Talk Is Cheap
programme.desc: Carrie is still crazy about Aidan and wants him back; Charlotte rethinks her baby plans.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Time and Punishment
programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself
programme.desc: Carrie and Aidan exchange keys; Miranda strains to maintain her strong woman image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hellraisers and Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Ed's old CIA comrade visits the casino pitching a new security system for the hotel.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Night the Lights Went Out in Vegas
programme.desc: Sin City screeches to a halt as a massive power outage brings darkness to the strip.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Things That Go Jump in the Night
programme.desc: When a guest declares his life-ending intentions, Danny and Ed race to stop him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Die Fast Die Furious
programme.desc: When a movie star dies while performing a stunt, Ed and Danny search for an explanation.

programme.title: Las Vegas: New Orleans
programme.desc: When a 'whale' skips town owing almost five million dollars, Ed has 36 hours to find it.

programme.title: Las Vegas: You Can't Take It With You
programme.desc: When a local hits a big cash jackpot at the Montecito Hotel, Danny must secure the winner.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Nevada State
programme.desc: Sam's past comes back to haunt her when an escaped murderer tracks her down at the hotel.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Sons and Lovers
programme.desc: Montecito's guest wins, but his wallet is stolen before he can indulge in his winnings.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Strange Life of Bob
programme.desc: Falling in love with a new employee, Nessa presses her new mystery man for more details.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Family Jewels
programme.desc: When five million dollars of diamonds are stolen, Danny and Mike try to catch the thief.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nessa discovers that a distraught blackjack player has a bomb strapped to his chest.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Always Faithful
programme.desc: When counterfeit $100 bills show up at the Montecito, Danny searches for the source.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Music and Meatloaf
programme.desc: Things start off on a high note when four chefs, including a ukulele instructor, must make a meatloaf without any of the usual ingredients. Next, how do you make an appetizer with less-than-appetizing items from a sample table.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Five Star Frozen Feud
programme.desc: Guy first challenges the chefs to make a five-star dinner using only frozen food. Then, in No Carts Allowed, the chefs must hunt down as many healthy kid meal components as they can hold in their arms.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Meals From the Middle Madness
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tests the limits of four chefs by allowing them to shop only in the middle aisles of the store. That means no fresh produce, no fresh meat and no fresh dairy.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Family Redemption
programme.desc: DDD Family Tournament teams who went home early are getting a duo do-over. First, Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to flip coffee and doughnuts into dinner. Then he gives the remaining DDD family duos a $22 budget to make their surf and turf dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Judges' Thanksgiving Throwdown
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for giving, but don't tell the four all-star chefs competing in Flavortown. They're ready to prove that it's possible to make Thanksgiving dinner with limited ingredients, then use the leftovers to make a completely different meal.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter ship sweet treats and some not-so-sweet treats to their chef friends with the challenge to use the ingredients in their best sweet-and-savory desserts and Napoleon cakes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Family Food Feud Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Two families return to GGG for more Flavortown fun in a three-round Thanksgiving family showdown. A member of each family pick from unidentified cans to determine the featured ingredient in their first meal.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Kids All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings GGG's most talented kid chefs back to Flavortown to find out once and for all who's the best culinary whiz kid. First, Guy sets up sample tables around the store with ingredients the kids must feature in their burgers.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Judges' Thanksgiving Throwdown
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for giving, but don't tell the four all-star chefs competing in Flavortown. They're ready to prove that it's possible to make Thanksgiving dinner with limited ingredients, then use the leftovers to make a completely different meal.

programme.title: Winner Cake All: Ahoy, Bakers!
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis challenges four of America's best cake-making teams to make a cake decoration for a destination bachelorette party. After the decoration round, one team is sent home.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Perfect as Pie
programme.desc: Ree Drummond proves that the pie's the limit with four irresistibly easy pie recipes. She makes a drunken pecan pie, a coconut cream pie with shortcuts, a cranberry and cherry cobbler pie and a super fast cast iron blueberry and nectarine galette.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Party Delights
programme.desc: Nine bakers must create a dessert with an unusual candy cane flavor then use a holiday cocktail as inspiration for the main heat. One baker is sent home.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Season of Sharing

programme.title: Swamp People: Bad Banana
programme.desc: Brock and Aaron gamble on a new hunting area, while 70-year-old Daniel goes on a solo hunt. Joey and Zak take on a mission to catch a monster threatening a local neighborhood.

programme.title: Swamp People: Friday the 13th

programme.title: Swamp People: Deadeye Driver
programme.desc: Daniel and Big Tee face off against trespassers, while Troy learns new tricks from an old timer. Meanwhile, Aaron and Brock get lost in the Bayou backwaters while Ronnie and Ashley navigate dueling airboats.

programme.title: Swamp People: Airboat Armada
programme.desc: Troy assembles a crew to infiltrate Cow Island. Ronnie and Ashley assist the Landrys with an armada of airboats. Brock and Aaron chase their biggest beast of the season: Dr. Steel. Then, invasive Burmese pythons are taking over the everglades.

programme.title: Swamp People: One Man Army
programme.desc: Troy makes an urgent plea to his armada to fill more tags, while Jacob and Don fish the waters of West Grand Lake for the biggest bull gators. Meanwhile, the Edwards go on a mission to catch the Moby Monster.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Big Little Surprise

programme.title: Raven's Home: Tesscue Me
programme.desc: Booker and Nia want to attend a high school party that Tess is going to, but Raven has already set up a game night.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sharp Job-jects

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Time Crisis/ Gramma Driver
programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot
programme.desc: When Tilly is mistaken for a baby, she searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Jessie: The Secret Life of Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: After finding a nest of eggs on the terrace, Jessie and Ravi discover that Mr. Kipling is really Ms. Kipling, and a mom-to-be. After misplacing her eggs, Ravi realizes he may have to work at becoming a better grandparent to baby lizards.

programme.title: Jessie: Cattle Calls and Scary Walls
programme.desc: Jessie auditions for a role in a television series and is convinced that she can talk her way into getting the part. However, it's Zuri who impresses the director. Emma, who Jessie left in charge at home, joins Ravi and Luke to look for rats in the walls.

programme.desc: When Tiffany's mother comes to visit, the Woodchucks try to help Tiffany pretend that Camp Kikiwaka is a camp for geniuses.

programme.desc: Aluminum screw caps, chocolate, pills and pasta are some of the most common items around today. Find out how they are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fire Fighter Boots, Garden Tools, Automated Machines, Gypsum Boards
programme.desc: Discover how firefighter boots are constructed and how garden tools are forged.

programme.title: How It's Made: Hearing Aids, 3-D Puzzles, Rubber Mats, Toilets

programme.title: How It's Made: Cookware, Biodiesel, Clothes Hangers, Insulation

programme.desc: Nail nippers, jade putters, ice ciders, and water skis are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Skateboard Wheels, Baklava and Galactoboureko, CO2 Scrubbers, and Honey Candles

programme.title: How It's Made: Speed Skates, Synthetic Rubber, Cocoa Beans, Bulk Chocolate
programme.desc: Find out how speed skates, rubber, cocoa beans, and bulk chocolate are made.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Dying Words
programme.desc: Steven Galvin is dead and bodycam video captures the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, a surprise witness turns this case on its head. And a play-by-play of the crime will reveal new evidence that brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Stay With Us, Madison
programme.desc: Madison Wells, a sixteen-year-old student in New Jersey, is found murdered in her aunt's kitchen. When police look into her relationship with a twenty-year-old, they go down a rabbit hole that exposes an abusive relationship with a tragic end.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Go in There
programme.desc: Beverly Puccio is brutally murdered and found at home by an oddly behaving ex-boyfriend. Detectives use security and traffic cam footage to piece together the last night of her life including an encounter with a mysterious stranger to find her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Puzzle Piece
programme.desc: When the battered body of Bianca Rainer, mother of two young girls, is found in rural Arkansas, the police have just one unusual clue, a puzzle piece found stuck to her body. But they know if they find the missing puzzle, they will find her murderer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: He's Not Going to Stop
programme.desc: Dr. Stephen Pitt, Veleria Sharp, Laura Anderson, Marshall Levine, Bryon Thomas and Mary Simmons are dead. Now, bodycam video captures the hunt of the spree shooter as he stays one step ahead. Before it's over, a shootout uncovers a raging madman.

programme.title: McMartin Preschool Trial: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: When the parents of children in a California preschool are informed that their kids may have been the victims of sexual abuse, it sets off a chain of panic and catastrophic events that will put an innocent man on trial for the heinous crimes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Who Killed Jane Doe 59?
programme.desc: Police search for the name of an unidentified woman murdered in 1969 and the person who killed her. The one lead that keeps coming up is Charles Manson and the Manson Family.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: He's Not Going to Stop
programme.desc: Dr. Stephen Pitt, Veleria Sharp, Laura Anderson, Marshall Levine, Bryon Thomas and Mary Simmons are dead. Now, bodycam video captures the hunt of the spree shooter as he stays one step ahead. Before it's over, a shootout uncovers a raging madman.

programme.title: McMartin Preschool Trial: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: When the parents of children in a California preschool are informed that their kids may have been the victims of sexual abuse, it sets off a chain of panic and catastrophic events that will put an innocent man on trial for the heinous crimes.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Stay With Us, Madison
programme.desc: Madison Wells, a sixteen-year-old student in New Jersey, is found murdered in her aunt's kitchen. When police look into her relationship with a twenty-year-old, they go down a rabbit hole that exposes an abusive relationship with a tragic end.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Heaven Turns to Hell
programme.desc: Debbie Jarvis was raised by a single mom. When she married Richard all her dreams finally came true. Everything seems idyllic. The relationship becomes contentious and no one could predict that a divorce and custody battle would end in murder.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Fatal Obsession
programme.desc: When 19 year-old Alyssa Austin marries 32 year-old Patrick Horath she feels she's found the man of her dreams, despite her family's disapproval. But no one could have guessed that bringing this man into her family would ultimately lead to murder.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Not My Mom
programme.desc: Kimberly Mangrum always lived life in the fast lane, but when she becomes a stepmother, this biker chick becomes hell on wheels. She tightens her grip on the family, but no one is prepared for the path of murder and destruction she will leave in her dust.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: A Murder You Can't Ignore
programme.desc: Successful and newly single, Colleen Batten is having a hard time starting over when she bumps into old flame, Bob Harris. She plans to change her luck with this father of three. His kids soon find out just how evil Colleen can really be.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Nanny Nightmare
programme.desc: Donna is fit,beautiful, and maternal -exactly what Dennis Yaklich needs as a single dad to four kids. Soon his children see another side to their new stepmom.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Candymen
programme.desc: The George Brothers grew up privileged, but had no respect for authority. In Florida's pill-mill epidemic of the late 2000s, the Georges rose to millionaire status, only to crash amidst a chaos of overdoses, arrests and a tragic train accident.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Trust Fund Terror
programme.desc: Identifcal twins Tim and Todd Nicholson lived fast and furiously until one was murdered at the hands of his own brother.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Born to Sin
programme.desc: Adopted twins Peter and Michael Versluys are raised in a loving home. As time goes by, however, the boys reveal their inner dark side and their lives become full of failure and deceit. Ultimately, their twisted bond exposes the evil that lies within.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Family Curse
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take a dark turn. Soon small lies and thievery give way to a global crime spree where the twins exploit the vulnerabilities of others in a cruel and twisted game.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: The suburbs of Detroit provide a comfortable backdrop for locals to build a life. One family though is quickly headed for disaster when affairs, lies, and explosive arguments lead someone to an early grave.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Fatal Fuse
programme.desc: Police find a homeowner dead in their driveway riddled with bullets. Although one of the victim's family members claims to have witnessed the brutal attack, the alleged chain of events raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Death is in the Heir
programme.desc: Living in Little Washington, North Carolina means you've made it. For one member of a local family though, nothing is ever enough. Old family money combined with a get-rich-quick attitude put deadly targets on everybody's backs.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look
programme.desc: Juanita Liebman and two friends plan to rob a man at Biketoberfest in FL, but it goes wrong and the three kick him into a coma. Juanita tries to lay low, but her epilepsy requires medical attention. The cops stake out the pharmacy to apprehend her.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt
programme.desc: After suffering a serious injury, Jaime Jones helplessly watches his bills and late notices on mortgage payments pile up. With his family's welfare at stake, he dons a disguise and robs banks to pay off his debts. But his greed will be his downfall.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot in the Leg
programme.desc: When a friend is fired from a restaurant, Konh Chung Bounnam and his friends decide to rob it. The plan goes awry and three people are killed. His friends are caught but Bounnam stays free. He hides until his need for money gets the FBI's attention.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Stitch in Time
programme.desc: Andrew and Melissa had a home inspection before they bought the house, but the inspector missed signs of obvious neglect that could lead directly to much bigger issues.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.desc: The ninjas are tasked with shaking up the main living room. They install all-new lighting to brighten up the dark space while the newly installed ceiling tiles add a touch of glamour. The finishing touch is a sea-inspired chandelier that's center stage.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Canadian National Exhibition/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is at the Canadian National Exhibition in Toronto to try a Thanksgiving waffle. Then he's off the Prairiefest in Oswego where he indulges in a kimchee Korean hot dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Sweet 'n' Savory Sensations
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the fairgrounds to sample midway munchies that satisfy every taste bud, from sweet to savory. From a bratwurst topped with sauerkraut and apple pie to garlic enhanced doughnuts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Crunch Time
programme.desc: From double-decibel fried beef ribs in Atlanta to a loud and proud peanut butter burger in Vegas, these joints are making delicious noise with some of the crunchiest eats across the country.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Mangia Meals
programme.desc: We're taking our tongues on a tour of Italy without leaving the States starting with a pizza in New York that's as large as the city's Italian population.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Eat Like a Local: California
programme.desc: From authentic tacos and first-class pizza to succulent seafood paella and beer can chicken, these dishes all come with a side of great weather, breathtaking scenery and the laid-back vibes of the Golden State.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Five Bbq Chicken Favorites

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing For Fire

programme.desc: To celebrate Thanksgiving, Mickey and the gang race Thanksgiving-themed racers. Minnie, Daisy and Cuckoo Loca host Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: TOTSGIVING / Woodbird's Wish
programme.desc: After Lucky nearly ruins Totsgiving, Pip, Freddy, and KC set out to save the holiday. Mr. Woodbird always dreamed of making a baby delivery, so Pip and Freddy are here to help.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Ring Bear / Bull of Energy
programme.desc: Mia loses her Auntie Cora's wedding ring! Pip and Freddy deliver an energetic baby bull early and must keep him out of trouble until his mom gets home!

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Toon Bops: The Robot Dance

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Turkey on the Town/ Friendship Feast
programme.desc: The Pugs search for a real turkey that Chloe can use as a model for her drawing. Rolly must have his favorite limited-edition flavor of dog food for the Annual Friendship Feast.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: TOTSGIVING / Woodbird's Wish
programme.desc: After Lucky nearly ruins Totsgiving, Pip, Freddy, and KC set out to save the holiday. Mr. Woodbird always dreamed of making a baby delivery, so Pip and Freddy are here to help.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mid-Air Care / The Itsy Bitsy Baby
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Think Pink/ You Foose, You Lose
programme.desc: Chilly turns pink after being washed with Doc's red scarf. Doc tells him his friends love him no matter what color he is. Johnny Foosball, the star player of Donny’s foosball game, keeps getting stuck upside down.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups on Parade / Pop's Promise
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cosmo Con/ Wanda's Day Off
programme.desc: Cosmo gets picked to host the secret fairy convention; Wanda visits a spa.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Odd Jobs/ Movie Magic
programme.desc: Dad wishes he had a cooler job; Timmy enters a film festival to impress Trixie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Sleep Over and Over/ Mother Nature
programme.desc: Chester and AJ are feuding and Timmy is caught in the middle; mom becomes a weathercaster.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy accidentally releases the crimson chin's arch-villain, all heck breaks loose.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Most Wanted Wish/ This Is Your Wish
programme.desc: Timmy wishes he was the most wanted kid in America; Mamma Cosmo is back.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Beddy Bye/ The Grass Is Always Greener
programme.desc: Timmy always falls asleep at 9 p.m., so he wishes for a world without sleep, much to the chagrin of the human race and the Sandman. Timmy runs away to become a carnie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Secrety Origin of Denzel Crocker
programme.desc: Every March 15th, Denzel Crocker reaches new heights in terror. Timmy has had enough and goes back in time to discover it's the date Crocker lost his fairies when he was a kid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Kung Timmy/ Which Witch is Which?
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that he had amazing kung-fu powers; Timmy is almost burned at the stake.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Pipe Down/ The Big Scoop
programme.desc: Timmy imposes silence; AJ and Chester try to expose Timmy as a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: The Loud House: Friended! With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne makes friends with a girl whose family wants to rent the apartment upstairs, and tries to dissuade another couple from renting in.

programme.title: The Loud House: Power Play With the Casagrandes/ Room for Improvement With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage. Desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hand-Me-Downer/ Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Last Stand
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick protest the construction of a highway that would destroy Jellyfish Fields.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Day Without Tears/ Summer Job
programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: It's Pony: Game Horse/ Unicorn
programme.desc: Annie and Pony use their video game skills to save their endangered friends. Then, Pony thinks he's become a unicorn, so Annie uses him to raise money to save their sports court.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Trouble / The Way of the Sponge
programme.desc: Sandy's air supply is destroyed; SpongeBob wants to earn his karate belt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.
